grounding_rules: Every claim must map to at least one evidence_id, signal_id, or source_id.
Intermediate agents must output structured objects, not prose-only text.
Only the final synthesizer may generate narrative paragraphs.
If evidence is insufficient, the agent must return explicit gaps instead of inference.
No section may invent numbers, acquisitions, launches, partnerships, or sentiments without evidence.
Every widget on every page must resolve to real data_keys; if data_keys are empty, render the empty-state card instead of fabricating content.

report_pages.page_goal: Give the CEO a 30-second view of the company, its scale, trajectory, and headline conclusion.

widgets.notes: Full-width banner: company name, ticker badge, industry chip, HQ location.
Gauge trio: overall score /100, confidence %, evidence coverage %.

report_pages.page_goal: Show company identity, scale, organization, products, leadership, and business description.
Explain revenue, margins, cash flow, capital allocation, and financial momentum.

widgets.notes: X: fiscal period, Y: revenue ($). Tooltip shows YoY %.

report_pages.page_goal: Compare company positioning, gaps, moats, pricing, features, and strategic threats.

widgets.notes: X/Y axes are configurable, e.g. Price vs Feature Depth; bubble size = market share.

report_pages.page_goal: Show sentiment, customer pain points, feature requests, and public discussion trends.

widgets.notes: Y: sentiment score -1..1, X: date, colored bands for positive/neutral/negative.

report_pages.page_goal: Explain tech stack, AI maturity, engineering velocity, patents, and modernization posture.
Present product portfolio, launches, maturity, pricing, growth products, and overlap with competitors.
Explain operating model, capacity, logistics, bottlenecks, and operational risks.
Surface the main business, market, regulatory, legal, operational, and execution risks.

widgets.notes: X: likelihood, Y: impact, bubble color: risk category.

report_pages.page_goal: Translate analysis into strategic priorities, actions, and executive decisions.
Expose provenance, citations, evidence coverage, and traceability.
